articles.title: Volvo teases a new affordable EV to replace discontinued EX30
articles.description: Volvo's compact, quirky EX30 had a lot of problems when it was first released. Tariffs essentially erased its affordability, making it more expensive to own, and a battery recall made it dangerous to park indoors. But its discontinuation didn't spell the end of Volvo's efforts to sell more affordable electric models. In fact, the Swedish […]
articles.author: Andrew J. Hawkins

articles.title: PlayStation exclusives aren't coming to PC anymore
articles.description: Sony reportedly won't release its major single-player PlayStation games on PC anymore. According to Bloomberg's Jason Schreier, Hermen Hulst, who heads up PlayStation's studios business, informed employees in a town hall on Monday about the change in strategy. Schreier had previously reported on the shift in March, saying that Sony scrapped plans to launch PC […]
articles.author: Jay Peters

articles.title: Musk v. Altman proved that AI is led by the wrong people
articles.description: The tech trial of the year, Musk v. Altman, was ultimately a fight for control. Elon Musk argued that Sam Altman, with whom he helped found the now-massive company OpenAI, shouldn't direct the future of AI. Altman's lawyers, in turn, poked at Musk's own credibility. A jury came to a verdict on Monday after just […]
articles.author: Hayden Field

articles.title: Walmart launches new budget-friendly Android tablets starting at $97
articles.description: Walmart's Onn brand just launched a whole line of budget-friendly Android tablets that, all together, cost less in total than a single iPad Pro. As spotted by 9to5Google, the six new tablets ship with Android 16 and all but one cost less than $200. The little Onn Core 7 is the most affordable of the […]
articles.author: Stevie Bonifield

articles.title: Dyson’s super-slim PencilWash just hit its best price to date for Memorial Day
articles.description: If Dyson’s PencilVac Fluffycones made you wish the company had built something similarly slim for scrubbing the hard floors in your home, enter the recently released Dyson PencilWash. The cordless cleaner is designed to tackle spills and stains on tile and other surfaces, and right now, it’s available for a new low price of $249.99 […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: All of the updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s battle over OpenAI
articles.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. After nearly a month […]
articles.author: Elizabeth LopattoHayden Field

articles.title: Elon Musk loses his case against Sam Altman
articles.description: After around two hours of deliberation, the jury has reached a unanimous verdict in Musk v. Altman, the tech trial of the year. The group found that two claims were barred by the statute of limitations, and a third failed thanks to the dismissal of one of these. The jury here is an advisory jury, […]
articles.author: Hayden Field

articles.title: Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons
articles.description: It's not just you - the Google Workspace apps are getting a new look. The redesigned app icons, leaked last month, are now rolling out widely, as we started noticing this morning. Users with the redesigned icons will notice they now have a gradient look that fades from lighter to darker shades, rather than being […]
articles.author: Stevie Bonifield

articles.title: Sony is raising short-subscription prices for PlayStation Plus
articles.description: Sony is hiking the starting price of one-month and three-month PlayStation Plus subscriptions in "select regions," blaming "ongoing market conditions." Beginning May 20th, 1-month subscriptions will start at $10.99 USD / €9.99 EUR / £7.99 GBP, while 3-month subscriptions will start at $27.99 USD / €27.99 EUR / £21.99 GBP. In the US, the changes […]
articles.author: Jay Peters
